interfaces.name: getSiteHeaderContext
interfaces.description: Get summary counts and totals for header icons (quote list, comparison, reading list, service inquiry) for the current user.

quote_list_currency.description: e.g., 'usd', 'eur' or empty if no items

interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage: highlighted equipment categories, featured tools, upcoming webinars.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentSectionsAndCategories
interfaces.description: Get equipment sections and their categories for navigation (e.g., Primary Treatment, Screens & Screening, Chemical Treatment).

interfaces.name: getEquipmentFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter ranges and discrete options for an equipment category listing page (e.g., DAF, screening, dosing skids).

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: EquipmentCategory.id for the listing (comes from URL, e.g., daf, screening, dosing_skids).

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products for a given equipment category with filters and sorting applied.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for an equipment product, including specs and category context.

interfaces.name: addProductToQuoteList
interfaces.description: Add a product to the internal quote list (creates the quote list if it does not exist).

interfaces.name: addProductToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a product to the comparison list (creates a comparison session if needed).

interfaces.name: getComparisonStatus
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the current comparison session for use in a comparison bar or header.

interfaces.name: getComparisonItems
interfaces.description: Get full details for products in the current comparison session for side-by-side comparison.

naoh_consumption_kg_per_h.description: Convenience field for pH neutralization systems

items.description: Spec rows to visually highlight, e.g., 'naoh_consumption_kg_per_h'

interfaces.name: removeProductFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the current comparison session.

interfaces.name: getQuoteList
interfaces.description: Get the current quote list with all items, totals, and associated product details.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteListItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a quote list item and return the updated quote list.

interfaces.name: removeQuoteListItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the quote list (e.g., remove the highest-priced item).

interfaces.name: submitQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit the current quote list as a quote request with user contact details.

interfaces.name: getServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level information for the Services overview page, including main service categories.

interfaces.name: getMaintenanceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for maintenance plans (countries, equipment types, response times, cost ranges).

interfaces.name: listMaintenancePlans
interfaces.description: List maintenance plans with filters (country, equipment type, response time, annual cost) and sorting.

parameters.name: serviceType
parameters.description: Should be 'maintenance_plans' for this listing (from URL).

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlanDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific maintenance plan.

interfaces.name: addMaintenancePlanToServiceInquiry
interfaces.description: Add a maintenance plan to the service inquiry list (creates the ServiceInquiry if it does not exist).

interfaces.name: getServiceInquiry
interfaces.description: Get the current service inquiry with all items and related maintenance plan details.

interfaces.name: updateServiceInquiryItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a service inquiry item.

interfaces.name: removeServiceInquiryItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the service inquiry.

interfaces.name: submitServiceInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit the current service inquiry with contact information.

interfaces.name: getResourceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for resources listing pages (case studies or webinars).

interfaces.name: listResources
interfaces.description: List case studies or webinars with filters and sorting.

year.description: Publication year for case studies or event year for webinars

start_time_from.description: Earliest start time (HH:MM) for webinars, e.g., '10:00'

start_time_to.description: Latest start time (HH:MM) for webinars, e.g., '12:00'

interfaces.name: getResourceDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a resource item (case study or webinar) for the resource detail page.

interfaces.name: saveResourceToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save a resource (typically a case study) to the user's reading list.

interfaces.name: getReadingList
interfaces.description: Get the user's reading list with saved resources.

interfaces.name: removeReadingListItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the reading list.

interfaces.name: listTools
interfaces.description: List available tools and calculators for the Tools & Calculators overview page.

interfaces.name: runEqualizationTankCalculation
interfaces.description: Run the equalization tank sizing calculation and return the calculation record plus recommended configurations and compatible tank series.

interfaces.name: getContactPageInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact page information including general contact details and regional support info.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact request from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: searchDistributors
interfaces.description: Search for distributors near a given ZIP/postal code for a specific market segment and radius.

interfaces.name: getDistributorDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single distributor for the Distributor Detail page.

interfaces.name: registerForWebinar
interfaces.description: Register a user for a webinar event with contact and role information.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get company profile content for the About page, including history, certifications, and core product lines.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the Privacy Policy page, including sections on data collection, processing, and user rights.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the Terms of Use page describing site usage, liability, and IP rights.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateQuoteList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the current user's QuoteList in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateServiceInquiry
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the current user's ServiceInquiry in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateComparisonSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the current user's ProductComparisonSession.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateReadingList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the current user's ReadingList.

helperFunctions.name: _runEqualizationTankFormula
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute required tank volume from flow, peak factor, and buffer time.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDistributorDistances
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute and sort distributor distances for a DistributorSearch.
